description: Single source of truth for project entity counts. Validators auto-compute actual values from computed_from globs and compare. Never hard-code these counts elsewhere — use descriptive language and reference this file when exact numbers are needed.

skills.description: GA agent skills with SKILL.md entry points

validators.description: Validation and lint scripts registered in the npm suite

vscode_extensions.description: Pre-installed VS Code extensions in the dev container

golden_principles.description: Agent-first operating principles (static, unlikely to change)

vscode_prompts.description: VS Code auto-loaded prompt files (discoverable via chat input /). Tracked separately from tools/apex-prompts/ which are non-auto-loaded APEX planning prompts.
